action.content: A sales pitch for moms is needed for a new kind of diaper that is designed to be more comfortable for babies. The sales pitch should be 500 words long, funny, engaging, and focus on the benefits of the new diaper without mentioning the price. It must also contain a title, wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
action.label: context

action.content:
<<The Diaper That Makes Moms Feel Like They're Wearing Clouds>>

Hey there, fellow mamas!

I know, I know, the world of diapers can be a bit overwhelming. But today, I'm excited to introduce you to a new kind of diaper that's designed to make your little one's life (and your own) a whole lot easier.

This new diaper is made with the latest in breathable, soft materials that are gentle on your baby's delicate skin. It's so comfortable, your little one might not even notice they're wearing it!

But here's the thing that really sets this diaper apart: it's designed to be worn by moms, too! Yes, you read that right. This diaper is so comfortable and easy to use, it's like a cloud on your little one's bottom. And when you're changing it, you're basically changing a cloud.
action.label: response
